2162640.name: ALTAIR BREAKER - ROYAL SET
2162640.description:
This is a set of additional "Avatars" and "Weapons" that can be used in the game "ALTAIR BREAKER".

The set includes the following items:
[Avatar]
- Knight Armor

[Weapons]
- Bayonet (Specialty: Shockwave)
- Kagutsuchi Blade (Specialty: Balance)
- Labrys (Specialty: Attack power)

Please change your avatar when you start the game for the first time or in your "My Room".
New weapons can be received from the red item box in the lounge.
You need the full game "ALTAIR BREAKER" to use these contents (sold separately).
Please update to the latest version before using this content.
2162640.supported_languages:
英语*, 日语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
